summary: Paper editor and question bank fixes: insert full question objects via Question Bank/AI buttons, enable inline editing, enforce Column A/Column B side-by-side layout, improve table headers/borders/editability, and reduce whitespace for images inserted in table cells.
known_issues: Insert Question from Question Bank and AI insert buttons are not inserting questions in the paper editor.
Question bank edit option currently does not allow editing text.
Pair option UI does not show Column A and Column B side-by-side.
Table UI missing Column A/Column B headers; borders not styled as required; headers not editable.
Images inserted into table cells consume excessive blank space.

existing_features.title: Fix the Question Bank “Use” action so that it inserts the full selected question object into the target paper section (not only plain text). The inserted question must preserve all supported fields (e.g., questionType, mcqOptions, fillInBlankData, trueFalseData, matchPairsData, tableData, imageAttachment, and any rich cell content/images), while generating a new unique question id and setting headingId appropriately for the destination section.

Fix the AI “Add to Paper” insertion so that it reliably inserts questions into the paper editor section indicated by the insert context, and ensure the inserted items are full Question objects consistent with the app’s Question model (including correct questionType and headingId assignment).

Enable inline editing for personal questions in the Question Bank. The “Edit” action must allow editing the question text directly within the list item/card and persist changes to the personal question store.

Update the match-pairs (Column A / Column B) editor and renderer so that Column A and Column B are always displayed strictly side-by-side, including on narrow/mobile screens (use horizontal scrolling or constrained layout rather than stacking vertically).

Improve the table question UI: show “Column A” and “Column B” headers, make those headers editable, and render darker borders (inner grid lines darker than current; outermost border also dark and clearly visible).

Reduce excessive blank/unused space when an image is inserted into a table cell so that the cell height more closely fits the image and surrounding content (minimize extra whitespace while keeping resizing controls functional).

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix paper editor: 'Insert Question from Question Bank' and 'AI' insert buttons should insert the full question object (text + options + images).
Fix question bank: enable inline editing (currently edit option not allowing text edits).
Fix pair/Column A-Column B UI: always render Column A and Column B strictly side-by-side.
Improve table option: display 'Column A' and 'Column B' headers, make them editable, and make inner/outer borders darker.
Fix table image layout: reduce excessive blank space when an image is inserted into a table cell (minimize whitespace).

projectName: Fix question insertion, inline editing, and Column A/Column B layouts in Paper Editor
